phases.title: Mexico City arrival
phases.description: Landing, jet lag recovery, River's 17th birthday, and a gentle mariachi dinner idea.

phases.title: Valle de Bravo retreat
phases.description: Family time, lakeside air, slow mornings, and easy local exploring.

phases.title: Monterrey leg
phases.description: Northern Mexico family time with relaxed plans and plenty of food.

phases.title: Mexico City middle leg
phases.description: Markets, Lucha Libre, World Cup energy, and flexible city days.

phases.title: Ixtapa resort mode
phases.description: All-inclusive beach time, pool days, and full recovery from city exploring.

phases.title: Mexico City final leg
phases.description: Final family catch-ups, souvenirs, and possible Puebla or Teotihuacan day trips.

phases.title: Return flights home
phases.description: Mexico City to Brisbane, with snacks, chargers, and patience.

days.summary: Depart Brisbane 8:05 AM on QF509, connect through Sydney and Dallas, arrive Mexico City 4:15 PM, settle in, eat nearby, recover from jet lag, and watch the Australia game.
days.familyNote: Source sheet includes the accommodation address; the web app stores only the general Mexico City area.

days.summary: Easy breakfast, Parque Mexico, Parque España, and Angel de la Independencia.
days.familyNote: Keep it gentle after the long flight and use short transfers between stops.

days.summary: Relaxed morning and afternoon, then River's 17th birthday dinner at Plaza Garibaldi with mariachi songs.
days.familyNote: Make the birthday festive, but avoid packing the day too tightly.

days.location: Mexico City to Valle de Bravo
days.summary: Check out from the Mexico City stay by 10 AM, then meet the family transfer in the evening and travel together to Valle de Bravo.
days.familyNote: Travel day with family logistics. Keep bags simple and leave space for arrival delays.

days.summary: Relaxed family time in Valle de Bravo and watch the Colombia game in the evening.
days.familyNote: Keep the day slow and save energy for family time.

days.summary: Stay with cousin Natis and enjoy relaxed family time.
days.familyNote: A deliberately quiet day by the lake.

days.summary: Relaxed Valle de Bravo day and watch the Australia game in the evening.
days.familyNote: Keep outings optional so the group can rest.

days.summary: Stay with cousin Natis and enjoy relaxed family time.
days.familyNote: Good day for photos, food, and doing less.

days.summary: Final relaxed Valle de Bravo day and watch the Colombia game in the evening.
days.familyNote: Start packing gently before the Monterrey travel day.

days.location: Valle de Bravo / Mexico City / Monterrey
days.summary: Driver takes everyone to the airport, then fly NLU-MTY on VB4417 at 8:45 PM.
days.familyNote: This is a logistics day; keep expectations low and dinner simple.

days.summary: Stay with aunt Norma and enjoy relaxed family time.
days.familyNote: Build the day around family, food, and air-conditioned breaks.

days.summary: Stay with aunt Norma and enjoy relaxed family time.
days.familyNote: One easy outing is plenty if the group wants to explore.

days.summary: Stay with aunt Norma and enjoy relaxed family time.
days.familyNote: Good reset day before the next travel block.

days.summary: Relaxed Monterrey day, with Colombia game / Fanfest option in the evening if Colombia finishes second in the group.
days.familyNote: Check crowd levels and keep the plan flexible.

days.summary: Fly MTY-NLU on VB7016 at 4:25 PM, transfer to the Mexico City stay, and watch the Colombia game / Fanfest option if Colombia finishes first in the group.
days.familyNote: Source sheet includes the accommodation address; the web app stores only the general Mexico City area.

days.summary: Teotihuacan pyramids day trip.
days.familyNote: Big outdoor day. Start early, take hats and water, and avoid long exposed walking where possible.

days.summary: Chapultepec Park and Castle.
days.familyNote: Use taxis or rideshares around longer sections to keep the day manageable.

days.summary: Historic Centre in the afternoon, with Colombia game / Fanfest option in the evening if Colombia finished second and passed R32.
days.familyNote: Pick a compact route and use a cafe break if the centre feels crowded.

days.summary: Mercado Coyoacan and Frida Kahlo Museum in the afternoon, with Colombia game / Fanfest option in the evening if Colombia finished first and passed R32.
days.familyNote: Book timed tickets if needed and keep the evening optional.

days.summary: Xochimilco boats.
days.familyNote: A fun group day, best kept simple with transport planned ahead.

days.summary: Anthropology Museum and Reforma walk.
days.familyNote: Use the museum as the anchor and keep the walk optional.

days.summary: Travel to Ixtapa on NLU-ZIH VB3676 at 11:05 AM and check in at Barceló Ixtapa.
days.familyNote: Switch into resort mode: pool first, unpack later.

days.summary: Barceló Ixtapa all-inclusive resort day: beach, pool, and rest.
days.familyNote: This is the official no-ambition day.

days.summary: Barceló Ixtapa all-inclusive resort day: beach, pool, and rest.
days.familyNote: Sun protection and hydration are the real itinerary.

days.summary: Barceló Ixtapa all-inclusive resort day: beach, pool, and rest.
days.familyNote: Check checkout and transfer details before the Mexico City return.

days.summary: Check out from Barceló Ixtapa, fly ZIH-NLU on VB3677 at 11:30 AM, transfer to the Mexico City stay, and watch the semifinal / Fanfest option in the evening.
days.familyNote: Source sheet includes the accommodation address; the web app stores only the general Mexico City area.

days.summary: Puebla day trip, then semifinal / Fanfest option in Mexico City in the evening.
days.familyNote: Keep the day trip optional if the group is tired after the beach transfer.

days.summary: Souvenir shopping at Mercado de Artesanias La Ciudadela.
days.familyNote: Set a spending limit and keep bags light.

days.summary: Lucha libre at Arena Mexico in the evening.
days.familyNote: Great teen-friendly night. Keep the daytime easy.

days.summary: Watch the third-place match / Fanfest option in the evening.
days.familyNote: Leave space for packing, goodbyes, and one final favourite meal.

days.summary: Depart Mexico City 3:00 PM on AA2547/QF4390, arrive Los Angeles 6:05 PM, then depart Los Angeles 9:10 PM on QF16.
days.familyNote: Long travel day. Charge devices and arrive early.

days.summary: Arrive Brisbane at 5:00 AM.
days.familyNote: No plans. Everyone gets a soft landing.
